mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, request_id, client_id, credential_version, capability_id, capability_code, capability_version, actor_user_id, service_user_id, active_org_id, idempotency_key, request_digest, business_state_digest, key_id, wrapped_dek, payload_iv, payload_ciphertext, payload_auth_tag, flow_model_key, process_instance_id, execute_status, result_code, result_snapshot, error_code, expires_at, completed_at, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_capability_approval WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM ai_capability_approval WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_capability_approval SET process_instance_id = #{approval.processInstanceId}, execute_status = #{approval.executeStatus}, result_code = #{approval.resultCode}, result_snapshot = #{approval.resultSnapshot}, error_code = #{approval.errorCode}, completed_at = #{approval.completedAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{approval.id} AND tenant_id = #{approval.tenantId} AND client_id = #{approval.clientId} AND capability_id = #{approval.capabilityId} AND request_digest = #{approval.requestDigest} AND del_flag = 0
